channel.title: Booked Job
channel.description: Real talk for service pros who'd rather be working — plumbers, roofers, HVAC techs and electricians. How to get more booked jobs, price your work, get paid, and dodge the lead-reseller traps. No fluff.
channel.itunes:author: Booked Job
channel.itunes:summary: Real talk for service pros — more booked jobs, better pricing, and how to stop getting ripped off by lead resellers.

item.title: Is Angi Worth It? The Real Cost of a Shared Lead
item.description: The honest math on Angi, Thumbtack, and HomeAdvisor — why your leads get shared with up to 12 pros, what it really costs per booked job, and what to do instead. Full breakdown + free calculator at booked-job.com.
item.itunes:summary: The honest math on Angi, Thumbtack, and HomeAdvisor — why your leads get shared with up to 12 pros, what it really costs per booked job, and what to do instead. Full breakdown + free calculator at booked-job.com.
item.itunes:author: Booked Job
